name: beauty-diary
description: Beauty Diary — women-oriented blog (Next.js + NestJS monorepo)

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter=@beauty-diary/shared run build && pnpm -r --parallel --stream run dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter=@beauty-diary/shared run build && pnpm --filter=...@beauty-diary/api --parallel --stream run dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter=@beauty-diary/shared run build && pnpm --filter=...@beauty-diary/web --parallel --stream run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter=@beauty-diary/shared run build && pnpm -r --filter=!@beauty-diary/shared run build
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && pnpm infra:up
